case_title: JANET L LENZINI VS. SAN FRANCISCO STATE UNIVERSITY et al

docket_entries.description: ORDER GRANTING DEFENDANT BOARD OF TRUSTEES OF CALIFORNIA STATE UNIVERISTY'S DEMURRER TO THE FIFTH AND SIXTH CAUSES OF ACTIONS

LAW AND MOTION 302, DEFENDANT BOARD OF TRUSTEES OF CALIFORNIA STATE UNIVERSITY'S DEMURRER TO THE 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT IS SUSTAINED WITHOUT LEAVE TO AMEND AS TO THE FIFTH AND SIXTH CAUSES OF ACTION. MS. LENZINI FILED A NOTICE OF NON-OPPOSITION ON APRIL 24, 2012. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. JUDGE: HAROLD KAHN; NOT REPORTED.

calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar May-14-2013 Vacated

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jul-24-2012 Set For Trial On Jun-03-13 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206

DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT
Off Calendar May-11-2012 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
John T. McGlothlin, Esq., Deputy Attorney General, Tel. 510.622.2224, appearing for Defendant and moving party.

No other appearance. The Court adopted its tentative ruling. DEFENDANT BOARD OF TRUSTEES OF CALIFORNIA STATE UNIVERSITY's DEMURRER TO THE 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT is Sustained without leave to amend as to the fifth and sixth causes of action. Ms. Lenzini filed a notice of non-opposition on April 24, 2012. Order signed in open court. Judge: Harold Kahn; Not reported.
